WARN: /data/fernape_data/FreeBSD-repos/ports/x11-wm/cwm/files/patch-Makefile: patch was not generated using ``make makepatch''.  It is recommended to use ``make makepatch'' when you need to [re-]generate a patch to ensure proper patch format.

No need to update a new patch, just use "make makepatch" in the future to conform to the proper format.

Thanks!
